package.name: rula_gui
package.description: Real-time ergonomic monitoring dashboard for ROS 2. Displays live annotated camera feeds, colour-coded RULA score bars, phase indicator pill, a scrollable system log, and a matplotlib trend diagram of upper/lower arm scores over time. Plays an audio chime when the RULA optimizer converges. Accepts operator hand-gesture commands (Thumbs Up / Down) in USER_ADJUSTMENT phase.
